arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ خُصَّ أَنْتَ أَوَّلَ ظَالِمٍ بِاللَّعْنِ مِنِّي،
english translation text:
Allāhumma khuṣṣa anta awwala ẓālimin bil-laʿni minnī,
O Allāh, single out the first oppressor for my curse,

arabic text: وَابْدَأْ بِهِ أَوَّلًا ثُمَّ الثَّانِيَ وَالثَّالِثَ وَالرَّابِعَ.
english translation text:
Wabdaʾ bihī awwalan thumm ath-thānya wa-th-thālitha wa-r-rābiʿ.
Begin with him, then the second, the third, and the fourth.

Allāhumm al-ʿan yazīda khāmisa,
O Allāh, curse Yazīd fifth of all,

arabic text: وَالْعَنْ عُبَيْدَ اللهِ بْنَ زِيَادٍ وَابْنَ مَرْجَانَةَ
english translation text:
Wa-l-ʿan ʿUbayd Allāh ibna Ziyādin wabna Marjānata
And curse ʿUbaydallāh ibn Ziyād, Ibn Marjāna,

wa ʿUmar abna Saʿdin wa Shimran
And ʿUmar ibn Saʿd and Shimr

arabic text: وَآلَ أَبِي سُفْيَانَ وَآلَ زِيَادٍ وَآلَ مَرْوَانَ
english translation text:
wa āla Abī Sufyān awa āla Ziyādin wa āla Marwāna
And the houses of Abī Sufiyān, Ziyād, and Marwān

ilā Yawm il-qyāma.
Until the Judgement Day.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ لَكَ الْحَمْدُ حَمْدَ الشَّاكِرِينَ لَكَ عَلَى مُصَابِهِمْ،
english translation text:
Allāhumma lak al-ḥamdu ḥamd ash-shākirīna laka ʿalā muṣābihim,
O Allāh to You belongs the praise, The praise of those who give thanks to You for their misfortunes,

Al-ḥamdu li-llāhi ʿalā ʿaẓīmi raziyyatī.
To Allāh belongs the praise for my great sorrow!

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ ارْزُقْنِي شَفَاعَةَ الْحُسَيْنِ يَوْمَ الْوُرُودِ،
english translation text:
Allāhumm arzuqnī shafāʿat al-Ḥusayni yawm al-wurūd,
O Allāh grant me the intercession of Ḥusayn on the Day I come forth from my grave,

Wa thabbit lī qadama ṣidqin ʿindaka
And make firm in your eyes my honest stance

maʿ al-Ḥusayni wa aṣḥāb il-Ḥusayn
With Ḥusayn, and the Companions of Ḥusayn

arabic text: الَّذِينَ بَذَلُوا مُهَجَهُمْ دُونَ الْحُسَيْنِ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَامُ.
english translation text:
al-ladhina badhalū muhajahum
dūn al-Ḥusayni ʿalayh is-salām.
who gave their lives in defence of Ḥusayn, peace be upon him.
